name: Suspicious Mailbox Rule Forwards All Email to an Untrusted External Location
description: A suspicious mailbox rule was created that forwards all email messages (which may contain sensitive or confidential information) to an untrusted location external to the company network [Delayed alert: Batch process detection]

filterSets.name: Suspicious Mailbox Rule Forwards All Email to an Untrusted External Location

author: Zachary Lee
